title: Hybrid sandbox model
rationale: 1 sandbox = 1 policy (OpenShell constraint). Multiple agents per sandbox share the same network policy. Separate sandboxes only when different network policies are needed. OpenClaw runs N agents per gateway inside a single sandbox.

title: Web UI is Next.js plus OpenClaw iframe
rationale: Next.js 16 React 19 for admin control plane. OpenClaw Lit web components embedded via iframe at /chat-ui/ for chat. Caddy strips X-Frame-Options to allow framing. Rebuilding chat in React would take 4-6 weeks with no gain.

name: gRPC-to-REST bridge
description: Express server on :3001 wraps OpenShell gRPC gateway into HTTP. Uses mTLS certs from ~/.config/openshell/gateways/. Service prefix is openshell.v1.OpenShell not the proto-defined diffract.v1.Diffract.

title: Session 2026-04-03: full control plane deployed
rationale: Built and deployed: policy revoke (dynamic baseline), channels management (Telegram with verification), browser auto-install (Playwright headless in onboard), dynamic Caddy routing, logs fix, gateway auto-start. All live at srv1534809.hstgr.cloud. Commit 71419d7.

name: Architecture audit 2026-04-03
description: Full codebase audit completed. Phase 1: 95%, Phase 2: 60%, Phase 3: 15%, Phase 4: 20%, Phase 5: 0%. Overall ~65%. Key gaps: no auth, no sandbox create UI, skills stub, no model switching UI. All 10 Rust crates built. Extras built: channels, browser install, dynamic Caddy, gateway auto-start.

title: Zapier MCP endpoint is mcp.zapier.com/api/v1/connect with token query param
rationale: Not actions.zapier.com/mcp/{key}/sse as initially assumed. Token is base64-encoded, passed as ?token= query parameter. Validated by calling tools/list before saving.

title: Onboard step order: provider→inference→sandbox (NemoClaw pattern)
rationale: NemoClaw creates sandbox AFTER inference is configured (step 5) so sandbox gets correct inference route at creation. Our current order creates sandbox first then patches inference later. Switching to NemoClaw order avoids the post-creation patch.

name: NemoClaw supports 7 inference providers
description: NVIDIA Endpoints, OpenAI (gpt-5.4), Anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-6), Google Gemini (gemini-2.5-flash), Ollama local, custom OpenAI-compatible, custom Anthropic-compatible. Each has curated model lists, validation, and credential management.

content: Relay service is dual-mounted: standalone on :9090 (api/relay-server.js) for direct use, and on main bridge at /api/relay/* (:3001) for UI. Routes in ~/.diffract/relay-routes.json. Ports via openshell forward list.

description: Merge conflict failed at tier ai-resolve. Branch: overstory/rbac-api-builder/Diffraction-43c2. Agent: rbac-api-builder. Conflicting files: api/server.js.
